description: Style NoteA wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed woman. wac by wrangler has perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes using classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt.Product DetailsMaroon belt, has a cut out design in the centre, tang clasp, holes to customise Fit and branding on the tail Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
